_comment: FastAPI Claude Code settings by MarsDevs (www.marsdevs.com)

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi || true

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(alembic/versions/.*\.py|poetry\.lock|requirements\.lock|\.generated\.)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit migration files, lock files, or generated code directly.'; exit 1; fi
